name: Red Rock Canyon Retreat
demoNotice: Demo draft, not an official website.
headline: Wake Up to Monument Valley Views.
description: Red Rock Canyon Retreat is perched on the edge of Sedona's most iconic red rock formations. Stargaze from your private deck, hike Cathedral Rock directly from the property, and experience the power of Sedona's famous vortex sites.

features.title: Unparalleled Red Rock Views
features.description: Every window frames Sedona's towering sandstone formations.

features.title: Direct Trail Access
features.description: Cathedral Rock trailhead within walking distance.

features.title: Energy Vortex Location
features.description: Located on Sedona's famed harmonious energy sites.

features.title: Private & Secluded
features.description: Spread across 10 acres with complete privacy between units.

amenities.title: Heated Pool & Spa
amenities.body: Year-round heated pool and hot tub

amenities.title: Yoga Deck
amenities.body: Outdoor yoga platform with canyon views
